# Risk Register (Inception)

_Produced in Phase 2 for non-trivial projects; lives at `doc/inception/analysis/risks.md`._

> **Relationship to other templates.** This is the inception **four-risk**
> (Value / Usability / Feasibility / Viability) register for project inception.
> For business-profile strategic assumptions use
> `strategic-assumptions-template.md`.

## Risks
| ID | Risk | Type | Likelihood | Impact | Mitigation | Owner | Residual |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|

- **type:** `value` | `usability` | `feasibility` | `viability`

## Heat-map summary
_Likelihood × impact grid; highlight the top risks to reduce first._

- <Risk ID> — <high likelihood × high impact>
- <Risk ID> — <high likelihood × high impact>

## Cross-links to the assumption register
_Each risk often corresponds to an assumption being validated — link IDs here (see `assumption-register-template.md`)._
| Risk ID | Assumption ID | Note |
|---|---|---|
